rationale: Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-j governs exemptions for tangible personal property temporarily located in Texas (goods, aircraft parts). It does not address residencehomestead exemptions, so the proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) does not conflict with this provision.
quote: goods, wares, merchandise, other tangible personal property, and ores, other than oil, natural gas, and other petroleum products, are exempt from ad valorem taxation by a political subdivision of this State
_note: The cited constitutional provision concerns personal property temporarily in Texas, not homestead exemptions. The relevant constitutional authority for homestead exemptions is Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b(c).
